title: Elytras Begone
description: Configurable data pack to remove or replace the elytra.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de3861677a27b16dcdf59df3b130208b14157aea.png)

This is an easy to use and configurable data pack to replace elytras which spawn in end ships with other items or disable them from begin equipped. Everything is configured through functions.

## List of functions

- `/function ebg:disable_elytras` - Disabled elytras from begin equipped.
- `/function ebg:enable_elytras` - Allows elytras to be equipped again.

### 

- `/function ebg:disable_replacement` - Disables the replacement of naturally spawning elytras.
- `/function ebg:replace_with_air` - Removes naturally spawning elytras.
- `/function ebg:replace_with_trident` - Replaces naturally spawning elytras with trident.
- `/function ebg:replace_with_diamonds` - Replaces naturally spawning elytras with diamonds.
- `/function ebg:replace_with_cake` - Replaces naturally spawning elytras with cake.
- `/function ebg:replace_with_enchanted_golden_apples` - Replaces naturally spawning elytras with enchanted golden apples.

##
